concerns.text: Task T016 ('Add validation logic...') depends on the output of T012 and T013 (task and skill generation), but is placed *before* them in the list. This violates producer-before-consumer ordering.

Task T026 ('Implement code/analysis/visualizer.py...') depends on the output of T023 and T024 (metrics calculation and agent integration), but is placed *before* them in the list. This violates producer-before-consumer ordering.

The User Story 1 section has tasks listed in a somewhat arbitrary order. While not a hard violation, reordering them to group generators (T012, T013) before consumers (T014, T015, T016) would improve readability and clarify dependencies.

Similar to User Story 1, the tasks in User Story 2 could benefit from reordering to group the executor implementation (T020, T021, T022) before the metrics and integration tasks (T023, T024, T025, T026).
